title: Simple Plates
description: Mostly one-pan meals built around a protein and a vegetable. Simply seasoned to bring out the flavor of the food. I'll eat a version of these for every meal.

title: Sides
description: Simple sides with flavor combinations I enjoy. Good alongside a meal or as a starting point.

title: Salads
description: There are lots of salad recipes in the world. I think salads are best made to your taste. These are a few I like.

title: Breakfast & Sweets
description: I like a little something sweet. Simple, thoughtful combinations.

title: Broths & Soups
description: Broths and soups. Warm, a little interesting, and easy to make.
